name: aberdeen-1996-unisys-clears-path-a-series-os2200
title: Unisys Clears the Path Ahead for A & OS 2200 Series Customers
description: Aberdeen Group profiles Unisys ClearPath HMP (Heterogeneous Multi-Processing) servers, which combine CMOS versions of MCP/AS and OS 2200 enterprise systems with Intel-based Unix/NT SMP servers in a single cabinet. Aberdeen examines how ClearPath gives Unisys's 8,500+ mainframe customers a migration path to open client-server architectures while preserving existing investments. The study notes that Unisys is transitioning from hardware to services, while hardware remains 40% of $6.2B in 1995 revenue.
